default_escalation: ambiguous requirements, security-sensitive changes, architectural changes, repeated failures, or user-requested deep review

ecc-aside.reason: Quick context-preserving side answers are low-risk and usually deterministic.

ecc-auto-update.reason: Update behavior is script-driven and does not require deep reasoning.

ecc-brainstorming.reason: Design exploration and tradeoff analysis benefit from deeper reasoning.

ecc-build-fix.reason: Most build fixes are mechanical after compiler output is available.
ecc-build-fix.escalation: the same error survives three attempts or the fix requires architectural changes

ecc-checkpoint.reason: Checkpoint creation and verification are deterministic workflow operations.

ecc-code-review.reason: Code review requires bug, security, and design judgment.

ecc-cost-report.reason: Cost reporting is a deterministic local data summarization task.

ecc-cpp-build.reason: Compiler and linker error loops are usually mechanical.
ecc-cpp-build.escalation: memory ownership, concurrency, ABI, or build-system architecture changes are required

ecc-cpp-review.reason: C++ review requires memory-safety, concurrency, and security judgment.

ecc-cpp-test.reason: TDD workflow requires test design, API shaping, and implementation judgment.

ecc-ecc-guide.reason: Repository navigation and command lookup are deterministic.

ecc-evolve.reason: Evolving instincts into workflows requires abstraction and consolidation judgment.

ecc-execute-doc.reason: Executing a multi-phase plan requires audit judgment between phases.

ecc-fastapi-review.reason: FastAPI review combines architecture, async correctness, security, and performance.

ecc-feature-dev.reason: Feature development crosses discovery, architecture, implementation, and review.

ecc-flutter-build.reason: Analyzer and build failures are usually compiler-guided.
ecc-flutter-build.escalation: state-management, navigation, platform-channel, or architecture changes are required

ecc-flutter-review.reason: Flutter review requires UI, state, performance, accessibility, and security judgment.

ecc-flutter-test.reason: Running and triaging existing Flutter tests is usually mechanical.
ecc-flutter-test.escalation: new test strategy, golden baselines, or integration architecture are needed

ecc-gan-build.reason: Generator/evaluator loops need scoring and convergence judgment.

ecc-gan-design.reason: Visual design evaluation and iteration require subjective quality judgment.

ecc-go-build.reason: Go build, vet, and lint errors are usually localized.
ecc-go-build.escalation: concurrency design, interface design, or module dependency strategy changes are required

ecc-go-review.reason: Go review requires idiom, concurrency, error-handling, and security judgment.

ecc-go-test.reason: TDD requires test design and implementation tradeoffs.

ecc-gradle-build.reason: Gradle build failures are often script and dependency diagnostics.
ecc-gradle-build.escalation: multi-module dependency design or Android/KMP architecture changes are required

ecc-harness-audit.reason: The scorecard is produced by a deterministic audit script.

ecc-hookify.reason: Simple hook rule generation can be handled by a lightweight model.
ecc-hookify.escalation: the rule affects broad permissions, shell execution, or security-sensitive behavior

ecc-hookify-configure.reason: Enabling or disabling existing hook rules is deterministic.

ecc-hookify-list.reason: Listing configured hook rules is deterministic.

ecc-instinct-export.reason: Exporting structured instinct data is deterministic.

ecc-instinct-import.reason: Importing structured instincts is mostly mechanical.
ecc-instinct-import.escalation: duplicates require semantic merging or conflict resolution

ecc-jira.reason: Ticket retrieval, comments, and transitions are tool-driven.
ecc-jira.escalation: requirements are ambiguous or the ticket needs implementation planning

ecc-kotlin-build.reason: Kotlin and Gradle build errors are usually compiler-guided.
ecc-kotlin-build.escalation: coroutine design, module boundaries, or dependency architecture changes are required

ecc-kotlin-review.reason: Kotlin review requires null-safety, coroutine, architecture, and security judgment.

ecc-kotlin-test.reason: TDD requires test design and implementation tradeoffs.

ecc-learn.reason: Extracting reusable patterns requires abstraction judgment.

ecc-learn-eval.reason: Pattern extraction plus self-evaluation requires deeper reasoning.

ecc-loop-start.reason: Starting autonomous loops requires safety and stop-condition judgment.

ecc-loop-status.reason: Loop status inspection is deterministic state reporting.

ecc-marketing-campaign.reason: Campaign strategy and creative generation require nuanced judgment.

ecc-model-route.reason: Routing recommendations follow a small deterministic heuristic.

ecc-multi-backend.reason: Multi-model backend workflows require orchestration and architecture judgment.

ecc-multi-execute.reason: Multi-model execution needs audit and merge judgment.

ecc-multi-frontend.reason: Frontend design workflows require subjective quality and implementation judgment.

ecc-multi-plan.reason: Collaborative implementation planning benefits from deeper reasoning.

ecc-multi-workflow.reason: Full multi-model workflows combine research, planning, execution, and review.

ecc-plan.reason: Planning requires requirements restatement, pattern grounding, risk assessment, and sequencing.

ecc-plan-doc.reason: Plan-document generation spans architecture, roadmap, execution, and test planning.

ecc-plan-prd.reason: PRD generation requires product framing and tradeoff decisions.

ecc-plan-r.reason: Plan-execute-review pipelines need planning and review judgment.

ecc-plan-t.reason: Plan plus TDD plus review requires deep implementation judgment.

ecc-plan-tr.reason: Plan plus TDD plus review requires deep implementation judgment.

ecc-pm2.reason: Service detection and PM2 command generation are structured and deterministic.

ecc-pr.reason: PR creation is mostly git and template automation.
ecc-pr.escalation: history analysis is complex, branch divergence occurs, or PR content needs strategic framing

ecc-project-init.reason: Dry-run onboarding plans are generated from explicit install manifests and stack markers.

ecc-projects.reason: Project listing and statistics are deterministic.

ecc-promote.reason: Promotion is simple when the target instinct is already clear.
ecc-promote.escalation: promotion requires semantic deduplication or broad policy judgment

ecc-prp-commit.reason: Smart commit staging and message generation are structured.
ecc-prp-commit.escalation: natural-language file targeting is ambiguous or changes are risky

ecc-prp-implement.reason: Executing implementation plans with validation loops requires implementation judgment.

ecc-prp-plan.reason: Comprehensive planning and codebase analysis require deeper reasoning.

ecc-prp-pr.reason: PR creation is mostly git and template automation.
ecc-prp-pr.escalation: history analysis is complex, branch divergence occurs, or PR content needs strategic framing

ecc-prp-prd.reason: Interactive PRD generation needs product and technical tradeoff reasoning.

ecc-prune.reason: Pruning stale pending instincts is deterministic.

ecc-python-review.reason: Python review requires API, typing, security, and idiom judgment.

ecc-quality-gate.reason: Quality gates are tool-driven formatter, lint, and type checks.

ecc-react-build.reason: React build and type failures are usually localized.
ecc-react-build.escalation: hydration, server/client boundaries, or state architecture changes are required

ecc-react-review.reason: React review requires hook correctness, rendering, accessibility, and security judgment.

ecc-react-test.reason: React TDD requires behavior-focused test design and component implementation judgment.

ecc-refactor-clean.reason: Tool-confirmed dead-code removal is mechanical with tests.
ecc-refactor-clean.escalation: dynamic references, public APIs, entry points, or uncertain usage are involved

ecc-resume-session.reason: Session loading and summarization are structured.
ecc-resume-session.escalation: the resumed work requires architectural planning or complex implementation

ecc-review-pr.reason: PR review requires bug, security, and design judgment.

ecc-rust-build.reason: Rust compiler diagnostics often provide precise fixes.
ecc-rust-build.escalation: ownership design, unsafe code, lifetimes, or API design changes are required

ecc-rust-review.reason: Rust review requires ownership, lifetime, unsafe, and error-handling judgment.

ecc-rust-test.reason: Rust TDD requires API and test design judgment.

ecc-santa-loop.reason: Adversarial dual review and convergence gates require deep review judgment.

ecc-save-session.reason: Session capture is structured summarization and file writing.

ecc-security-scan.reason: AgentShield produces deterministic findings and scores.
ecc-security-scan.escalation: critical or high findings require remediation design

ecc-sessions.reason: Session list, alias, and metadata operations are deterministic.

ecc-setup-pm.reason: Package manager preference configuration is deterministic.

ecc-skill-create.reason: Skill extraction from history requires abstraction and quality judgment.

ecc-skill-health.reason: Skill health dashboards are structured inventory and reporting tasks.

ecc-test-coverage.reason: Generating missing tests requires branch, behavior, and mocking judgment.

ecc-update-codemaps.reason: Codemap generation is repository scanning plus structured summarization.

ecc-update-docs.reason: Source-of-truth documentation sync is mostly mechanical.
ecc-update-docs.escalation: documentation requires architectural interpretation or unresolved source conflicts
